name: Shield of Faith
description: +2 AC (concentration, 10 min)

name: Warding Bond: AC
description: +1 AC (concentration)

name: Ceremony: Wedding
description: +2 AC for 7 days (two creatures)

name: Agile Parry
description: +2 AC while holding kensei weapon (until next turn)

name: Arcane Deflection: AC
description: +2 AC (reaction, single attack)

name: Soul of the Forge
description: +1 AC while wearing heavy armor

name: Bladesong
description: +INT AC, +10 speed, advantage on Acrobatics (1 min)

name: Mage Armor
description: Base AC becomes 13 + DEX (8 hours, no armor)

name: Barkskin
description: AC can't be less than 17 (concentration, 1 hour)

name: Fighting Spirit
description: 5 temp HP + advantage on attacks (bonus action, 3/long rest)

name: Guardian of Nature: Great Tree
description: 10 temp HP, advantage on CON saves (concentration, 1 min)

name: Vitality of the Tree
description: Temp HP = your level (rage start)

name: Dark One's Blessing
description: Temp HP = CHA mod + warlock level (on reducing enemy to 0 HP)

name: Celestial Resilience
description: Temp HP = warlock level + CHA mod (short/long rest)

name: Touch of Death
description: Temp HP = WIS mod + monk level (on reducing enemy to 0 HP)

name: Adrenaline Rush
description: Temp HP = proficiency bonus (Dash as bonus action, Orc)

name: Armor of Agathys
description: 5 temp HP (+5 per slot level above 1st), deals cold damage to melee attackers

name: False Life
description: 1d4+4 temp HP (+5 per slot level above 1st). Roll dice and set manually

name: Heroism
description: Temp HP = spellcasting ability mod at start of each turn (concentration). Set manually

name: Aid
description: +5 max HP and current HP (+5 per slot level above 2nd, 8 hours)

name: Longstrider
description: +10 ft speed (1 hour)

name: Blade Flourish
description: +10 ft speed (until end of turn)

name: Drunken Technique
description: +10 ft speed (Flurry of Blows, until end of turn)

name: Dread Ambusher
description: +10 ft speed (first turn of combat only)

name: Aura of Alacrity
description: +10 ft speed (aura, allies within 10 ft)

name: Guardian of Nature: Primal Beast
description: +10 ft speed, advantage on STR attacks, +1d6 force damage (concentration, 1 min)

name: Ashardalon's Stride
description: +20 ft speed, deals fire damage when moving (+5 per slot above 3rd, concentration)

name: Zephyr Strike
description: +30 ft speed on next turn, no opportunity attacks (concentration)

name: Large Form
description: +10 ft speed, become Large (bonus action, 10 min, Goliath)

name: Haste
description: Double speed, +2 AC, advantage on DEX saves, extra action (concentration, 1 min)

name: Steady Aim
description: Speed becomes 0, advantage on next attack (bonus action, Rogue)

name: Warding Bond: Saves
description: +1 to all saving throws (concentration)
expr: STR.SAVE += 1; DEX.SAVE += 1; CON.SAVE += 1; INT.SAVE += 1; WIS.SAVE += 1; CHA.SAVE += 1

name: Arcane Deflection: Save
description: +4 to one saving throw (reaction, single save). Apply to relevant save only
expr: STR.SAVE += 4; DEX.SAVE += 4; CON.SAVE += 4; INT.SAVE += 4; WIS.SAVE += 4; CHA.SAVE += 4

name: Bless
description: +1d4 to attack rolls and saving throws (concentration, 1 min). Dice bonus — apply result manually

name: Pass without Trace
description: +10 to Stealth checks (concentration, 1 hour)

name: Bear Totem Spirit
description: Resistance to all damage except Psychic while raging

name: Stoneskin
description: Resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage (concentration, 1 hour)

name: Full of Stars
description: Resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing while in Starry Form

name: Stormborn
description: Resistance to cold, lightning, and thunder while Wrath of Sea is active

name: Superior Defense
description: Resistance to all damage except Force (1 min, 3 Focus Points)

name: Umbral Form
description: Resistance to all damage except Force and Radiant (6 Sorcery Points)

name: Fiendish Resilience
description: Resistance to one chosen damage type (until next short/long rest)

name: Steps of Night
description: Fly speed equal to walking speed (bonus action, 1 min, Twilight Domain)

name: Draconic Flight
description: Fly speed equal to walking speed (bonus action, 10 min, Dragonborn)

name: Celestial Revelation: Wings
description: Fly speed equal to walking speed (1 min, Aasimar)

name: Power of the Wilds: Falcon
description: Fly speed equal to walking speed while raging (Path of Wild Heart)

name: Writhing Tide
description: 10 ft fly speed, hover (bonus action, 1 min, Swarmkeeper)

name: Rage Damage
description: +2 damage to STR melee attacks while raging (+3 at 9th, +4 at 16th)

name: Divine Favor
description: +1d4 radiant damage on weapon hits (concentration, 1 min)

name: Hunter's Mark
description: +1d6 force damage to marked target (concentration, 1 hour)

name: Magic Weapon
description: +1 to attack and damage (+2 at 4th-level slot, +3 at 6th, concentration, 1 hour)

name: Elemental Weapon
description: +1 to attack, +1d4 elemental damage (concentration, 1 hour)

name: Crusader's Mantle
description: +1d4 radiant damage for all allies in aura (concentration, 1 min)

name: Spirit Shroud
description: +1d8 damage within 10 ft (+1d8 per 2 slot levels above 3rd, concentration, 1 min)

name: Holy Weapon
description: +2d8 radiant damage on weapon hits (concentration, 1 hour)

name: Sneak Attack
description: +(level+1)/2 d6 damage once per turn (advantage or ally adjacent)

name: Divine Strike
description: +1d8 damage once per turn on weapon hit (+2d8 at 14th level)

name: Dreadful Strikes
description: +1d4 psychic damage once per turn on weapon hit (Fey Wanderer)

name: Mindless Rage
description: Immune to charmed and frightened while raging (Path of Berserker)

name: Form of Dread
description: Immune to frightened, temp HP = 1d10 + warlock level (bonus action, 1 min)

name: Enhance Ability
description: Advantage on one ability's checks (concentration, 1 hour)

name: Guidance
description: +1d4 to one ability check (cantrip, concentration). Dice bonus — apply result manually
